TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqCon-dialog5_dakis_takun 2020s

S.FORM: takun.
un un wa su inu.
wa ku sapah.
o kii huwa su mu denwa wada inu laqi kii di ha.
S.TRANSL: 我本來要打電話給你的. 那些小孩子去哪裡了？
I was thinking to call you. Where did those children go?

S.FORM: wa hini ka kingan ngudus kii dung a.
wada inu.
ga naq so mhemuc mkkesa alang.
S.TRANSL: 他自己在部落四處晃晃。

S.FORM: wada skadi malu heya ado eniqan na ado eniqan rulu han un un eniqan kana kamera.
S.TRANSL: He is well. He has a car. He has a camera.

S.FORM: uxe uxe ka kingan kingan nii da asi maku tqipi hini.
S.TRANSL: 另一個就不是了，他只能縮在這裡。
The other is not. He could only squat here.

S.FORM: ka pa a patis a ka pa a patis a kari seediq peni kari seediq.
S.TRANSL: He is writing on the Seediq language.

S.FORM: o uka uxe mehedu musa skadi uri ma.
S.TRANSL: Hasn’t he gone to look for it?

S.FORM: a ma eniqan seediq nosaan na rmengo.
ima naq mkela peni.
egu egu riyung so REDosaun duri.
S.TRANSL: 我自己也有很多地方要去。
I myself have many places to go, too.

S.FORM: yaku naq maha sa.
diannao nii gaga na hunun ga na so theyaqun theyaqun naq kingan alang kingan ali na.
S.TRANSL: 他在搞電腦。他整天在部落玩電腦。
He is doing something with the computer. He plays the computer all day in the tribe.

S.FORM: un ma maanu ga na theyaqun ga so hari.
smalu kiya naqah si.
S.TRANSL: 他好像在做那個又說不好。
He seems to be doing that but says it does not work.

S.FORM: wa kiya naq jikang maanu bale kii di.
S.TRANSL: 他的時間都花在那裡，那怎麼可以呢？
His time was all spent on that. How can it be like that?

S.FORM: a a malu si malu ma.
uxe uka kari dung.
uxe ini eyah baro kari na.
S.TRANSL: 是不是他的聲音沒出來？
Is it that its sound does not come out?

S.FORM: inu ma kika eniqan spika a maanu di henu na han na.
S.TRANSL: 不是有喇叭嗎？那個他的什麼...

S.FORM: rapa so hari ga naqah.
S.TRANSL: 好像是他的喇叭壞掉了。
It seems his speaker is out of order.

S.FORM: inu naq kmekulun ka ngudus ka.
eniqan naq rulu ma eniqan kamera.
S.TRANSL: He has a car and a camera.

S.FORM: tutuy ciga ma keta knwana tutuy a.
S.TRANSL: He got up so early in the yesterday morning.

S.FORM: seediq peni wa smebuc paye han ciga.
mrebu o musa psasing hiya.
musa ku nanto ciga um meyah ku u kengus maanu kekong ma.
S.TRANSL: 我昨天去南投參加結婚。
I went to Nantou yesterday to attend wedding.

S.FORM: nakahara hini.
kenu uxe.
uxe kekong laqi na iyung nawi uri peni saya.
S.TRANSL: 今天不是Iyung Nawi的小孩也結婚嗎？
Isn’t a child of Iyung Nawi getting married today?

S.FORM: a saya kiya.
ciga han o.
meyah ku qidian sngari sterung mu kdere a sipo wa ngudus nguduss ga na.
S.TRANSL: 我回來的時候，超過十一點，遇到鬍鬚，他在對面懸崖那裡。
When I came back, it was over eleven o’clock. I ran into the beard, who was at the other side on the cliff.

S.FORM: mkkesa di a.
maanu psasing a psasing ga hmuwa manu hngali ta.
S.TRANSL: He was taking pictures of our Hngali.

S.FORM: un saya o ga psasing quri breenux ka hngali ta.
S.TRANSL: 他就面對著我們的Hngali平原拍照？
So he took pictures of our Hngali plain?

S.FORM: un bsuring Hngali ta ga musa psasing hiya ma.
S.TRANSL: 對，他去那裡拍我們Hngali的耕地。
Yes, he went there and took pictures of our farmland in Hngali.

S.FORM: un ma naq malu heya kmhemuc mkkesa mesa mesa ku.
S.TRANSL: 我想他怎麼那麼好，可以去想去的地方。
I think how good it is for him to go wherever he wants.

S.FORM: heya naq murux neyah ka mqedin.
S.TRANSL: 只有他一個人嗎？那個女的有來嗎？
Is he alone? did the woman come?

S.FORM: uka meyah a.
kii ga ku na rengoun maha ku naq a niciyo ga ku na kesaun.
S.TRANSL: 他原本就跟我說：「我星期天要回去。」
He said to me, “I’m going back on Sunday.”

S.FORM: a muka a ima di mukan wa.
S.TRANSL: 哪一位？ 是那個閩南人嗎？
Which one? That Southern Min guy?

S.FORM: maha hmuwa naqah bushi bushi bushi naqah henu ma hmuwa ka ngudus maha kiya uri.
S.TRANSL: 那個鬍鬚怎麼樣，也要走嗎？
What about the beard? Is he leaving, too?

S.FORM: o wa su hmuwa hmuwa ma tayriku ma wa su ye su jueding maha.
S.TRANSL: 要去大陸的事怎麼樣了？你決定要去了嗎？
How about that matter of going China? Have you decided to go yet?

S.FORM: asi naq a .
S.TRANSL: 那就這一兩天可能兩萬要匯過去了啦。

S.FORM: o eniqan un hmuwa ye su maha bale ye su.
ha maha ku so.
eniqan o mita hii kiya hari da.
S.TRANSL: I will go there to see it.

S.FORM: o naqah wa ini ku gdema musa mi musa m mdamac m mteme seediq ga gmeeluk pila taicu hi wa.
S.TRANSL: 不巧我沒空，我要去台中湊熱鬧看搶錢。
Unfortunately, I will not be free. I’m going to join in watching people fighting for money in Taichung.

S.FORM: maanu kiya o.
um a malu kii dungan.
heya um malu kii riyung malu riyung o knuwan eniqan su jikan ha ta mita texan.
S.TRANSL: 很好。你有時間的時候，我們去看一次。
It’s fine. When you have time, let’s go see once.

S.FORM: iya ani su naq ini pahae su mu pqita ku te ta huwa mesa mukan pgeeluk pila.
S.TRANSL: 不管怎樣，我帶你去看看台灣人怎麼搶錢。
No matter what, I will take to see how Southern Min people fight for money.

S.FORM: maha su inu.
eniqan yoji ga e um maha su ngerac.
un.
ima ka osaun namu mita ga mhuqin singgi.
S.TRANSL: 你們要去信義鄉看的那個過世的人是誰？
Who is the person who passed away and who you will go to see in Xinyi?

S.FORM: wa wa uka di.
uka mukan.
o o a 所以說很麻煩suoyi shuo hen mafan.
kelaun wada inu di peni paadis kiya.
S.TRANSL: 可能...我不曉得那個信在哪裡了。
Maybe... I don’t know where that letter is.

S.FORM: e meniq ku ka meniq ku hini kusun.
o meniq ku hini kusun因為下午我有課 eniqan ma ku tmgesa laqi kusun.
S.TRANSL: 我會在，因為明天要去教重修課。
I’ll be here because tomorrow I’m going to teach a retake course.

S.FORM: ma ma maha namu ngerac dungan kiya ga hmuwa.
ga hmuwa.
meyah knuwan detumun di.
S.TRANSL: When do Tumun and others come back?

S.FORM: deheya so hari deheya mneyah denwa ciga sanj ceka rabi o mndaha.
S.TRANSL: 昨天晚上可能是他們打來的電話，兩次。
It might be their phone call three o’clock yesterday midnight, twice.

S.FORM: inu kiya wa saya wa saya.
ma maha kelaun moda maha德國.
S.TRANSL: 他們在法國，然後會經過荷蘭，到德國。
They are in France. Then they are going to pass the Netherlands and go to Germany.

S.FORM: un un un 我都忘光wa mu chungiun da le mu naq.
S.TRANSL: I forgot. I thought it was...

S.FORM: ye su uxe neyah alang ma uxe.
S.TRANSL: Are you not coming back to the tribe?

S.FORM: uxe miicu ku mimah wa naqah.
S.TRANSL: No, I’m afraid of drinking. It’s bad.

S.FORM: ado ku uncuin na pmahun ku daha de.
S.TRANSL: 如果我有時候喝一兩杯，他們讓我喝的話...
If I sometimes drink one or two cups. They make me drink...

S.FORM: kii.
yaku naq yaku naq dung maanu ka imahun ta.
S.TRANSL: 我自己又很後悔，我們為什麼要喝。
I myself will regret why we drank.

S.FORM: unsaun su mita.
mnarux naqah kiya wa.
S.TRANSL: I heard that is a bad illness.

S.FORM: uxe so hari yani uxe pqbsiyaq.
S.TRANSL: It seems that he won't last long.

S.FORM: iya kmheti rmengo.
wada sapah na saya di.
ima naq mkela qnitaan mu texan ke a oriru henu hii.
S.TRANSL: 誰知道呢？我有一次看到他在那裡下車。
Who knows? I saw him there get out of a car once.

S.FORM: so hari uka beyax na mkesa di.
S.TRANSL: 他連走路的力量都沒有。
He even doesn’t have the strength to walk.

S.FORM: hei hei mnnanang paru seediq kii cbeyo.
S.TRANSL: 那個人以前身體非常強健。
That man used to be very strong.

S.FORM: kiya naqah qitaan.
S.TRANSL: So he does not look good.

S.FORM: so mnnanang riyung so hari kure riyung di ma.
S.TRANSL: 他本來很強健，現在好像很瘦。
He used to be very strong, but now seems to be very thin.

S.FORM: meyah do ga smiling a laqi rseno nii.
adisi mrebu kusun da ma adisun mu hmaduc a kii.
S.TRANSL: 明天早上帶他來好了，然後我可以陪他。
Bring him over tomorrow morning. Then I’ll accompany him.

S.FORM: meyah mrebu de osai hmaduc ciida di.
S.TRANSL: 你早上來的話，那個時候送去。
If you come in the morning, send him at that time.

S.FORM: uxe ini huwa usa skadi mrebu han eniqan seediq rengoun kesai.
S.TRANSL: 不是啦，沒關係啦。叫他早上先去找，才有人對話。
No, it does not matter. Tell him to look for people in the morning, so there are people to talk with.

S.FORM: ima naq mkela peni.
uxe ga naqah henu na ga.
S.TRANSL: 不是啦，他那個好像壞掉。

S.FORM: diannao na ga ga na ini adisi a manu di mprengo mprengo na gaga.
huwa bari hori hini ma.
S.TRANSL: He intended to buy it in Puli.

S.FORM: so smhlis uri laqi wa.
uxe de ini so ima naq madis nii eniqan tayhoku kiya mu sa.
S.TRANSL: 誰要帶這個？他說：「台北有我這個東西」。
Who will bring this? “I have this in Taipei,” he said.

S.FORM: un pnqbahangan ku kii meniq tayhoku texan.
S.TRANSL: 在台北曾經用那個給我聽。
He once had me hear that in Taipei.

S.FORM: mdrumuc laqi nii.
o so kii mukan.
kii na naq.
kii na naq.
un un iya chungii nii patis a uda hini kusun denu tarao su mu denu.
S.TRANSL: 不要忘記那個文件。你明天從這裡經過，我會等你。
Don’t forget this document. Pass by here. I’ll be expecting you.

S.FORM: un kelaun su muda kelaun su so paadis pila henu.
S.TRANSL: 你知道經過...你才知道怎麼寄錢。
You know to pass...so you know how to transfer money.

S.FORM: un un kiya ha.
